concerns.detail: Deletion removes parenthetical defense that the professor's PhD students are doing well, suppressing a substantive positive observation about the advisor while retaining negative context
Insertion contains sarcastic personal attack characterizing professor as tyrannical/power-hungry using the idiom 'covers the sky with one hand'
concerns.excerpt: 一手遮天的haoran啊, 真的是走到哪都是顶流...

concerns.detail: Content includes gendered slur 'academic Daji' (学术妲 己), comparing a female student to a legendary femme fatale, constituting an unsupported personal character attack
